comment:
Ограничения: \(\displaystyle \begin{cases}
x >0\\
x\neq 1
\end{cases}\)
$$\log_2x+\frac{2}{\log_2x}\geq\frac{3}{(\log_2x)^3}$$
Замена: \(\log_2x=t\)
$$t+\frac{2}{t}\geq\frac{3}{t^3}\\ \frac{3}{t^3}-\frac{2}{t}-t\leq 0\\ \frac{-t^4-2t^2+3}{t^3}\leq 0\\ \frac{t^4+2t^2-3}{t^3}\leq 0\\ \frac{(t^2+3)(t^2-1)}{t^3}\geq 0$$
Поделим на \((t^2+3)\), т.к. \((t^2+3)>0\)
$$\frac{(t^2-1)}{t^3}\geq 0$$
Применим метод интервалов:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
t\geq -1\\
t< 0
\end{cases}\\
t\geq 1
\end{array} \right.$$
Вернемся к замене:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
\log_{2} x\geq -1\\
\log_{2} x< 0
\end{cases}\\
\log_{2} x\geq 1
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
x\geq 2^{-1}\\
x< 2^{0}
\end{cases}\\
x\geq 2^{1}
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
x\geq \frac{1}{2}\\
x< 1
\end{cases}\\
x\geq 2
\end{array} \right.$$
Ответ: \(x\in [\frac{1}{2};1)\cup [2;+\infty )\).
